title: Stop Claude from forgetting anything
summary: Hermes is a desktop tool that solves Claude's session memory loss by maintaining a persistent memory store across multiple projects and building a reusable skill library. It functions as a stateful companion layer that preserves context and details between sessions without requiring users to re-explain context for each new project.
writeup: The video introduces Hermes, a desktop tool that addresses Claude's loss of memory between sessions by keeping a persistent memory store across multiple projects. It operates as a stateful companion layer that preserves context and details so prior information does not need re-explaining for each new project. Hermes also builds a reusable skill library, extending the persistent memory beyond stored context. The relevance lies in agent memory and context optimization: a layer that retains state across sessions rather than starting cold each time.
